text: The dim, bluish light and angled perspective make me feel as if I'm on the threshold of a secret or unspoken idea. There’s quiet anticipation in this liminal office or lab-like space, as if innovation lingers just beyond the glass. My own reflection mingles with neon, provoking thoughts on the boundaries between me and the world I perceive. I feel contemplative—curious about what knowledge is forged here and what it means to seek understanding in such sterile silence.
